properties.name: --color-text-inverse
properties.description: Text color on dark surfaces (buttons, chips).

properties.name: --color-ui-overlay-base
properties.description: RGB triplet for composing hover/active overlays via rgba(). Inverts under dark mode (0,0,0 light; 255,255,255 dark).

properties.name: --color-hover-overlay
properties.description: Prebuilt hover overlay, theme-aware. Use instead of hard-coded rgba(0,0,0,…).

properties.name: --color-border-subtle
properties.description: Low-contrast border for dividers and outlines.

properties.name: --duration-instant
properties.description: Motion token — 0ms (essentially immediate). Added in Phase 2 token pipeline.

properties.name: --duration-fast
properties.description: Motion token — short transitions (hover, small state changes).

properties.name: --duration-base
properties.description: Motion token — default transition duration for most UI changes.

properties.name: --duration-slow
properties.description: Motion token — larger elements entering or leaving.

properties.name: --ease-standard
properties.description: Motion easing — default curve for most transitions.

properties.name: --ease-accelerate
properties.description: Motion easing — for elements leaving the screen.

properties.name: --ease-decelerate
properties.description: Motion easing — for elements entering the screen.
